results.justification: Lion's sign-based momentum already uses sign-of-direction structure of gradient history — directly adjacent artefact + similar effect to SHADUF's sign-based counterweight.
Lion uses sign(β1·m + (1-β1)·g) update — sign-based momentum direction control; SHADUF's update u = lr(g - γ·c·sign(g_prev)) is a structural variant.
Lion's sign-momentum is shown to implicitly solve constrained optimization — bistable behaviour resembles SHADUF's bistable interpretation.
Symbolic discovery paper for Lion; same artefact, similar formal structure.
Survey notes momentum cancellation of positive/negative damps oscillation — same effect.
Second-order methods including Muon — different artefact (matrix preconditioner).
Refined Lion with stability fixes — same artefact + adjacent goal.
Theoretical foundation: when gradients alternate +/-, momentum term cancels and damps oscillation — exactly the SHADUF effect achieved by standard momentum.
